content.full_text:
October 23, 2006

Richard E. Patton
1155 Parkhill Street
Colusa, CA 95932

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-182

Dear Mr. Patton:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of October 18, 2006, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
